title: sqlmap
description: Automated SQL injection detection and exploitation tool.
fullExplanation: sqlmap is an open-source penetration testing tool that automates the detection and exploitation of SQL injection vulnerabilities. It supports all major databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MSSQL, Oracle, SQLite) and all SQLi techniques (error-based, blind boolean, time-based, union, stacked queries). It can dump databases, read/write files, and execute OS commands.

commonCommands.description: Use saved Burp Suite request file
Get OS shell via SQLi (if DB allows)

keyFacts: Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, MSSQL, Oracle, SQLite, DB2, Firebird
All SQLi techniques: error-based, union, blind boolean, time-based, stacked
--level (1-5): test more parameters. --risk (1-3): use more dangerous payloads
Always get written authorization before running sqlmap
